subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Water velocity within non-drinking water service pipework must not exceed 3 m/s for no less than 99% of the time that water is required during the peak hour.

callout.p: During the hour of heaviest usage in reticulated non-drinking services, a water velocity of 3 m/s must not be exceeded for 99% of the time that any downstream fixtures are in use.
